title: SPARTA Strategy Factory v1 - Launch Bundle 001 (Inventory + Map + Build Plan)
scope: Launch Strategy Factory v1 as a separate additive research lane after JARVIS Bundle B reached READY_FOR_STRATEGY_FACTORY_V1.
executive_summary: The Strategy Factory exists as a proven, manual, offline validation ladder. 8 strategies tested across futures+crypto lanes, all PARKED, 0 promoted, OOS protected. Reusable validation core (D1-D11) is built; test suite green (329/0); the red config test was fixed at 102202a. The named 'automated overnight discovery system' does NOT exist: no orchestrator, no canonical candidate registry file, no hypothesis queue, and no process isolation. Build hygiene (worktree + commit guard) first, then the orchestration layer.

validation_core_built.role: IS-only runner with hard OOS seal (path + bar-date)
friction ladder; IS and OOS at each level
per-module verdicts -> research decision + readiness tier
safe discovery CLI (list-modules/describe/synthetic-smoke/synthetic-e2e/version); no dynamic import

legacy_orchestration.note: First-gen single-pass NQ ORB loop (proposer->backtester->metrics->report->decision); NOT wired to the validation ladder, candidate registry, or per-branch engines.

crypto_offline.provenance: SHA256-pinned, provenance.json + MANIFEST.md, 2026 sealed out, QA CLEAN

observation_layer.note: Read-only; opens only report.json; runs no factory job; did NOT open Factory v1.

futures.rules: NQ primary; ES independent; micros proxy-only

crypto.rules: BTC primary; ETH/SOL corroboration; spot-only; perps BLOCKED until funding frozen

lanes.separation_rule: Futures and crypto validation claims must never be mixed.

ladder.hard_rule: frozen spec + locked params + branch/commit recorded; blocks later modules if not frozen
IS window only; OOS files refused at path + bar-date layers
pre-register pass/watch/fail AND commit before OOS
run OOS once; protocol hash must match a commit
NQ primary, ES independent, micros never independent
low->severe R-cost; IS and OOS at each level

pass_fail_watch_rules: IS_FAIL => full STOP/PARK; never advance to OOS; never tune in place (new branch + fresh spec)
top-3 / top-1% winner-removal gate rejects fat-tail-carried records even if headline net positive
trade-count floor >=30; PF gates continue >=1.30 / park >=1.00 / else kill
OOS one-shot vs committed protocol hash; no reruns; no post-OOS tuning
primary instrument (NQ/BTC) must carry its own evidence; corroborators cannot rescue it
factory_v1_map.readiness_note: PAPER_READY / LIVE_READY unreachable on default path; require a separate readiness memo with explicit override fields.

candidate_registry.note: Registry reconstructed from per-branch reports; JARVIS reconstructs a read-only view from data/profit_brain_strategy_survival.json.

exists: reusable validation ladder modules A-L equivalents (D2-D8)
hard OOS seals (path + bar-date), one-shot OOS, committed-protocol gate
safe discovery CLI + synthetic end-to-end smoke
frozen QA-clean provenance-pinned data for both lanes
green test suite (329/0), config-test regression fixed
missing_for_overnight_automation: orchestrator: engine/validation_runner.py + engine/validation_gates.py proposed in Factory-D1 but NOT built; nothing chains A->L with gating; factory_loop.py is legacy NQ-ORB single-pass
canonical factory-owned candidate registry file (currently reconstructed ad hoc)
hypothesis queue / structural-idea backlog (proposer.py only does NQ ORB param search)
process isolation: dedicated factory-research worktree planned (D4) but NOT created
automation commit-guard: Repo-Hygiene-D3 is plan-only; pathspec discipline still manual
safe dynamic strategy registration (CLI forbids dynamic import; need vetted allow-list)

hygiene_status.D4_worktree_isolation: PLAN only; worktree NOT created (dirty shared tree; single worktree cannot isolate two sessions)
hygiene_status.P2_hydra_junk_path: cosmetic git-status warning at repo root; outside factory; cleanup deferred & unauthorized

block_H_hygiene_first.scope: Create isolated worktree per Repo-Hygiene-D4 (git worktree add ../sparta-factory-research -b factory-research/...) so the overnight loop has its own index/tree and cannot race JARVIS HEAD
Land Repo-Hygiene-D3 commit-guard (explicit-pathspec wrapper / advisory lock) so automated commits are race-proof by construction

block_O_orchestration_after_H.scope: engine/validation_runner.py - chain A->L for one frozen engine with gating; uniform reports; no optimization; no auto-promote; STOP at PARK/PROMOTE
engine/validation_gates.py - encode pass/watch/fail floors as reusable assertions; floors pre-registered before results
candidate_registry.json + writer - append-only branch/spec/verdict/commit ledger; never edits a sealed verdict
hypothesis_queue - queued frozen-spec backlog; structural ideas only; no parameter sweeps
safe strategy-registration allow-list (no dynamic import of arbitrary code)
manual-start offline overnight batch entrypoint: walk queue -> runner -> registry, writing into isolated worktree; no network/broker/scheduler-daemon; human review gate at each PARK/PROMOTE
tests for runner/gates/registry/queue + synthetic overnight dry-run; suite stays green

standing_constraints: paper/live tiers require separate readiness memo

verdict_rationale.not_blocked: validation core built and proven; tests green; data frozen/QA-clean both lanes; OOS discipline held across 8 branches; config-test regression fixed
verdict_rationale.not_ready_to_build_yet: an automated overnight system is unattended and commit-writing - the worst exposure to the documented JARVIS HEAD-race; process isolation (D4 worktree) and commit-guard (D3) are planned but not built
verdict_rationale.therefore: finish Block H (H1 worktree + H2 commit-guard), then Block O orchestration; matches standing Crypto-D14 REPO_HYGIENE_FIRST and Repo-Hygiene-D4 worktree-first plan

final_line: Strategy-Factory-v1 Launch Bundle 001 is an inventory/map/plan bundle only. The validation core is built, proven, and test-green, but the automated overnight discovery system does not exist and its prerequisites (D4 worktree isolation, D3 commit-guard) are plan-only. Verdict: FACTORY_V1_NEEDS_HYGIENE_FIRST. All 8 branches remain PARKED; no active strategy; no paper/live; OOS sealed.
